description: CustodyComms Update Manifest - Controls forced updates and version requirements

highlights: Fixed import issue — Drag-and-drop and file selection now work reliably
Cleaner PDF exports — Reduced spacing between messages for more compact, readable evidence packages
Faster demo refresh — Old cached screenshots are automatically cleared when demo data updates
Stability improvements — Various bug fixes and performance optimizations
Dark Mode is here — Choose Light, Dark, or match your system settings automatically
Android SMS support — Import XML backups from SMS Backup & Restore
Stronger Evidence Protection — Pre-export verification ensures source files haven't been modified
Sign your affidavit electronically — FRE 902(14) certification directly in the app
Redesigned Help Center — Interactive Quick Start Guide with progress tracking
Easier multi-file imports — Clear popup when dropping multiple files
Premium polish — Smooth animations, ripple effects, and a more responsive feel
Import SMS, email, and messaging app data
